name: Meatballs & Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Lean Ground Beef (or Ground Chicken or Ground Turkey)
4 Garlic cloves, crushed (or 2 minced garlic cloves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the meat into 1-inch meatballs.
2. Add the meatballs to the cooking spaghetti sauce.
3. Heat oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
4. Add onions and garlic, and sauté for 2 minutes.
5. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan.
6. Cover and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring often.
7. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring often for at least 15 minutes.
